summary: Sieve of Eratosthenes returning all prime numbers less than or equal to n via sieveOfEratosthenes.
Prime factorization returning prime factors with multiplicity in ascending order via primeFactorize.
Modular exponentiation computing base raised to exp modulo mod via fast exponentiation in modPow.
Extended Euclidean algorithm returning g x y where a times x plus b times y equals the gcd g via extendedGcd.
Modular multiplicative inverse of a modulo m in range zero to m or null when none exists via modInverse.

tests.desc: a multiple of m has no inverse

tests.call: (() => { const inv = modInverse(3,11); return inv === null ? null : (3*inv) % 11 })()

summary: Binomial coefficient n choose k computed exactly for small n returning zero when k is negative or exceeds n via binomialCoeff.

tests.desc: k greater than n is zero

summary: Integer square root computing the floor of the square root of n exactly without floating point error via integerSqrt.
Digit sum computing the sum of the decimal digits of the absolute value of n via digitSum.
